name: Avery Dennison Corp
summary: PART I Company Background Avery Dennison Corporation (Avery Dennison or the Company and generally referred to as we or us) was founded in 1935 and incorporated in Delaware in 1977 as Avery International Corporation, the successor corporation to a California corporation of the same name incorporated in 1946. In 1990, we merged one of our subsidiaries into Dennison Manufacturing Company (Dennison), as a result of which Dennison became our wholly-owned subsidiary and in connection with which we cha...
